killzone_overlap.note: LOW OVERLAP — ICT_KZ adds new timing constraint

waterfall.label: L0  Base ensemble (14 sigs, Sharpe-wt, no extra gates)
L3  + T1 is ICT institutional level
L4  + OB or FVG entry zone  ← FULL ICT GATE
L7  + OB Sweep-and-Fill (wick sweep + close back inside)
L7b SF STANDALONE (bias + KZ + OB SF only)
L6a ICT + CIS exit (score/JEDI decay → emergency stop)
L6b ICT + Station TP (next opposing OB → draw on liq)
L6c ICT + Station TP + CIS emergency  ← MM TRAIN
L8  OB SF + Station TP + CIS  ← PRECISION MM TRAIN ★

devils_advocate: ICT gate DEGRADES Sharpe vs L0 — adding gates is reducing good trades not bad
MM TRAIN MARGINAL: Station+CIS +0.536 vs fixed +4.794 (-4.258) — meaningful but not dominant
CIS EXIT (+0.536) > Station TP (+0.524) — momentum exit outperforms structure; TP stations may be misidentified
